mapper.insert: INSERT INTO match_results (user_id, resume_id, jd_id, overall_score, skill_score, experience_score, keyword_score, gap_analysis) VALUES (#{userId}, #{resumeId}, #{jdId}, #{overallScore}, #{skillScore}, #{experienceScore}, #{keywordScore}, #{gapAnalysis}::jsonb)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, resume_id, jd_id, overall_score, skill_score, experience_score, keyword_score, gap_analysis::text AS gap_analysis, created_at FROM match_results WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, resume_id, jd_id, overall_score, skill_score, experience_score, keyword_score, gap_analysis::text AS gap_analysis, created_at FROM match_results WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} AND jd_id = #{jdId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
